_comment: Stage 08 — Correlated Monte Carlo Example Configuration
_description: Add these fields to your simulation_settings section to enable correlated asset paths.

simulation_settings._comment_mc_use_correlated_paths: Enable correlated Monte Carlo (recommended for stress tests)
simulation_settings._comment_mc_correlation_matrix: Historical 2000-2024 correlation matrix for US/Japan equities, USD/JPY, and US bonds

_explanation.purpose: Models the 'safe-haven yen' effect: when US stocks crash, USD/JPY tends to fall (yen strengthens), softening the net loss for JPY-resident retirees.
_explanation.effect: Correlated paths produce a NARROWER JPY confidence band than independent paths with the same marginal distributions.
_explanation.validation: The engine validates symmetry and positive semi-definiteness. If validation fails, it emits a warning and falls back to independent paths.
_explanation.default_behavior: If mc_use_correlated_paths is false or mc_correlation_matrix is empty, the engine uses independent paths (V7.5 baseline).
